name: io.github.infino-ai/code-context
description: Local code search for AI coding agents: hybrid search and SQL aggregation over an in-repo index.

environmentVariables.name: CX_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: Repository root to serve. Optional - defaults to the working directory the server is launched in.

environmentVariables.name: CX_INDEX_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Where the index lives. Optional - defaults to .infino/ inside the repository root.

environmentVariables.name: CX_AUTO_SYNC
environmentVariables.description: Set to 0 to disable the background staleness sync that runs as queries arrive.

environmentVariables.name: CX_NO_EMBED
environmentVariables.description: Set (1/true/yes) for keyword-only mode - skip the vector stage entirely.
